## Use this template for example when ##

* A search for use does not display the expected counter (e.g. search for "dog" displaying "棟")
* A counter card displays an incorrect use (e.g. "匹" card listing "building")

## Mistake details

* Counter identifier (see the "Is this incorrect?" dialog): 
* Database version (see the "About" dialog): 
* Counter: 
* Inappropriate usage: 
* Appropriate counter for usage:
